scene.imageSummary: Lukas stands pressed against the wide linden tree trunk, perfectly still, a bright red apple balanced on top of his head. His eyes stare straight ahead, wide and focused, as the blurred crowd watches from the background.

setting.description: The wide, ancient linden tree with dark furrowed bark and a carved mark at child's eye height. An open cobblestone plaza stretches in front, with a soft blur of medieval-clothed townspeople watching in silence from the background.
setting.lighting: Flat overcast morning light, cool and grey
setting.camera: Close-up, slightly low angle looking up at Lukas against the tree
setting.depthLayers: Lukas and tree trunk filling foreground, empty plaza space between, blurred crowd far background

characters.name: Lukas
characters.action: Back pressed against tree bark, staring straight ahead, unnaturally still

objects.name: Linde auf dem Marktplatz
objects.position: center background, wide trunk directly behind Lukas

objects.name: Apfel auf Lukas' Kopf
objects.position: balanced on top of Lukas's head, slightly tilted

scene.translatedSummary: Lukas steht reglos an den Stamm der Linde gepresst, den leuchtend roten Apfel auf dem Kopf, den Blick starr geradeaus gerichtet.
